mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(version_id), 0) + 1 FROM file_versions
INSERT INTO file_versions ( version_id, file_id, version_number, file_path, file_size, uploader, uploaded_at, saved_name ) VALUES ( #{versionId}, #{fileId}, (SELECT NVL(MAX(version_number), 0) + 1 FROM file_versions WHERE file_id = #{fileId}), #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{uploader}, SYSDATE, #{savedName} )
mapper.update: UPDATE file_versions SET saved_name = NULL, file_path = NULL, file_size = NULL WHERE file_id = #{fileId}
mapper.select: SELECT f.FILE_ID, f.LOGICAL_NAME, v.VERSION_ID, v.FILE_PATH, v.SAVED_NAME, v.FILE_SIZE FROM files f JOIN file_versions v ON f.FILE_ID = v.FILE_ID WHERE v.VERSION_ID = #{versionId} AND f.IS_DELETED = 'N'
